title: Expanding Managed Agents in Gemini API: background tasks, remote MCP and more
author: Philipp Schmid Developer Relations Engineer Google DeepMind
raw_description: We’re announcing new capabilities in Managed Agents in Gemini API so developers can build reliable, production-ready agents.
summary: Google在Gemini API中推出Managed Agents新功能，支持后台任务、远程MCP等，帮助开发者构建可靠的生产级AI代理。
analysis_note: 核心亮点是增强代理的可靠性和生产就绪性，但技术细节有限，评分中等偏上。
